Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Defts' Request For Production Of Document--Set One, And Form Interrogatories--Set One And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents and form interrogatories set #1 and for and for issue, evidentiary, or monetary sanctions is granted in part. Any general objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to provide verified responses on or before February 3, 2006. The motion for issue or evidentiary sanctions is denied. The motion for monetary sanctions is granted. The Court finds that counsel for plaintiff failed to respond in a timely fashion and asserted unmeritorious objections. Counsel for plaintiff is ordered to pay $1086.30 on or before February 28, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
